title: Settings Guide
subtitle: How to configure PaintKit for your desired result

options.label: 24 colors (Beginner)
options.effect: Large, simple regions — fast to paint, great for first-timers

options.label: 48 colors (Advanced)
options.effect: Fine region division, closest to the original photo

sections.title: Detail Level
sections.content: Controls how finely regions are split.

options.label: Low
options.effect: Large regions, fast painting, abstract feel

options.label: High
options.effect: Small regions included, detailed work, best for high-res photos

sections.title: Canvas Size
sections.content: Choose based on how you plan to print.

options.label: A5
options.effect: Portable, small print, great for practice

options.label: A4
options.effect: Standard home printer size, most versatile

options.label: Frame sizes (F4–F50)
options.effect: For printing directly onto canvas frames

sections.title: Color Guide
sections.content: Lightly tints regions with their assigned color.

options.label: Outline Only
options.effect: Traditional diagram style, for experienced painters

options.label: With Color
options.effect: Each region shows its color faintly — recommended for beginners

options.label: Clean
options.effect: Simple, broad regions — good for quick painting

options.label: Detailed
options.effect: More regions and finer lines — good for realistic results

sections.title: Fit Mode
sections.content: How to handle aspect ratio differences between photo and canvas.

options.label: Fit
options.effect: Entire image fits within canvas, may leave empty margins

options.label: Fill
options.effect: Canvas fully covered, may crop edges. Adjust with crop preview.
